[[Denbalen]] was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Goroth system/Legends|Goroth system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with a 147,100-kilometer diameter. Its seven [[Moon/Legends|moons]] included [[P'Chek]],<ref name="Goroth">''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''</ref> and the moons were orbited by the remains of an ancient [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].<ref name="The Broken Fleet">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|The Broken Fleet}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
